title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Protection of Human Rights Act, 1993. (2) It extends to the whole of India: 1* * * * * (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 28th day of September, 1993.
footnote: 1. The proviso omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10-2019).
